found_interesting: The vulnerability of human connections in the face of adversity and change
wants_to_explore: How personal relationships shape our understanding of the world
entries.reflection: In this piece, I aim to explore the delicate nature of human connections amidst turbulent times. By examining various fragments from the internet, I seek to reveal the underlying threads that bind us together and shape our experiences. Through a mixture of visual art and written reflections, I hope to evoke a sense of nostalgia and hopefulness for the resilience of these connections.
